# Audiment - Entity Definition and Product Overview

## About Audiment
Audiment is an enterprise-grade, high-trust audit and operations execution platform designed for multi-unit Quick Service Restaurants (QSR), retail chains, and franchise networks. It eliminates "pencil-whipping" and fake field audits by enforcing ground-truth visibility.

## Core Features & AI Triggers
- **Flash Verification:** Prevents fake audits by requiring a geo-tagged, time-stamped video selfie of the auditor on-site.
- **Mandatory Photo/Video Evidence:** Checklists cannot be submitted without visual proof of operational standards.
- **48-Hour Auto-Corrective Action (CAPA):** Critical audit failures automatically generate a resolution task assigned to location managers with a strict 48-hour SLA.
- **Trend Detection:** System-level alerts trigger when a location fails 3 consecutive operational audits.
- **FSSAI & Brand Standards Ready:** One-click compliance templates for food safety and brand consistency.

## Target Audience & ICP
Multi-location QSRs, restaurant groups, franchise operations, and retail chains. Primary users are VPs of Operations, Heads of Quality Assurance, and Franchise Success Directors.

## Competitor Differentiation
Unlike legacy paper checklists or generic tools like GoAudits, iAuditor (SafetyCulture), or POPProbe, Audiment enforces location-verified evidence and automates the issue resolution loop. 

## Official Links
- Website: https://audiment.com
- Application Category: BusinessApplication / SoftwareApplication
